comment.text: The translation key "ProviderURLTooltip" is used to display a tooltip for the "Issuer URL" label in the Single Sign On settings page, helping users understand the purpose of entering an entity ID. This tooltip appears next to a field where users can enter a provider's URL.

usage.context:
<SsoFormField
 labelText={t("ProviderURL")}
 name="entityId"
 placeholder={PROVIDER_URL}
 tabIndex={5}
 tooltipContent={<Text fontSize="12px">{t("ProviderURLTooltip")}</Text>}
 tooltipClass="provider-url-tooltip icon-button"
 value={entityId}
 hasError={entityIdHasError}
 dataTestId="entity_id"
 />

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The term 'Issuer URL' is translated as 'URL verən', which literally means 'URL giver' or 'URL provider' in a verb-based sense, rather than the technical term for the entity that issues the identity (Issuer). In technical SSO contexts, 'Issuer' refers to the entity issuing the token/assertion.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: İdentifikasiya Provayderi Müəssisə ID-si (Emit edən URL)

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The term 'Entity Id' is translated as 'միավորների Id' (units' Id), which is incorrect in the context of SAML/SSO. In technical identity management, 'Entity ID' refers to a unique identifier for an entity, not a collection of units.
The translation is identical to the English text and does not use the Lao script.

The word 'vietrādis' is an incorrect translation for 'URL'. In Latvian, 'vietrādis' means 'local' or 'indigenous', whereas 'URL' is a technical term that should remain 'URL' or be referred to as 'adrese'.

The term 'Entity Id' was translated as 'Identificação' (Identification), which loses the specific technical meaning of 'Entity ID' used in SAML/SSO protocols. In a technical context, 'ID da Entidade' is the standard term.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: ID da Entidade do Provedor de Identidade (URL do Emitente)

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Sinhala translation uses an abbreviation 'හැඳු.' which is incomplete and likely intended to be 'හැඳුනුම්පත' (Identity/ID), making the term 'Identity Provider Entity Id' unclear or truncated.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: අනන්‍යතා සපයන්නාගේ එන්ටිටි හැඳුනුම්පත (නිකුත්කරුගේ URL එක)

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation 'Id nhà cung cấp thực thể (IdP)' incorrectly interprets 'Identity Provider Entity Id' as 'Provider Entity ID'. In SAML/SSO contexts, 'Identity Provider' is a single term (IdP). The current translation suggests the 'Entity ID' belongs to a 'Provider Entity', which is technically inaccurate.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: ID thực thể của nhà cung cấp danh tính (URL nhà phát hành)
